description_long: This coupe car features a sleek, aerodynamic body with a metallic silver finish and a distinctive fastback roofline. The front end is characterized by a wide, aggressive grille and sharp, angular headlights, while the rear showcases slim taillights and a subtle integrated spoiler. The side profile reveals large alloy wheels, flush door handles, and a gently sloping roof that merges seamlessly into the rear. The windows are tinted and the roof appears to have a panoramic glass section, enhancing the modern, upscale appearance. The car's proportions suggest a sporty yet practical design, likely accommodating four passengers. Chrome accents and detailed trim further emphasize its premium build quality.
description: A sleek, silver coupe car with a fastback roofline, large alloy wheels, and tinted panoramic windows, exuding a modern and sporty aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide grille, sharp headlights, and sculpted hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the fastback roofline, large wheels, and two-door coupe profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displays slim taillights, integrated spoiler, and rear window.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the coupe's streamlined silhouette and window configuration.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows per side
